galleries.title: Purple - May 2026
galleries.description: Shot through a Pentax Spotmatic on a roll of Lomochrome Purple set to 200 ISO, as a test.

photos.caption: This ship is a fiberglass recreation of a ship from the late 1800s. It's name is Friendship, and it is beautiful.
This happy accident looks like a pigeon that is about to step into a portal. That portal is an unexpectedly-in-frame mirror.
